MaxLineLength:DiagnosticsScanSection.kt$label = if (recommendation.appliedTemporarily) "Temporary DNS override active" else "Encrypted DNS recommended"
MaxLineLength:DiagnosticsViewModelTest.kt$DiagnosticsViewModelTest$rationale = "Encrypted DNS stayed clean while UDP DNS was substituted."
